positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical ornamental illustration featuring interconnected elements of celestial bodies, blooming bioluminescent flowers, and intricate cosmic fauna. The composition must be centered, designed as a repeating, tileable motif, suitable for apparel screen printing. Use a stylized retro-vintage aesthetic, characterized by clean, thick outlines and strong negative space silhouettes. Color palette: deep indigo, soft gold, ethereal teal, and matte black. The lighting should create a dramatic, etched feel, giving the illusion of a glowing, engraved tapestry against a clean, solid background. Art style should mimic sophisticated Nordic mythology meets Art Nouveau stained glass, emphasizing symmetry and visual balance.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, low detail, artifact, asymmetry, excessive color gradients, photography, photorealism, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, cartoon, messy lines
